generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our city's emergency preparedness budget got cut by 20% last year, and guess what? The federal government's 'national security' funding increased by the same amount. Coincidence? I don't think so. We need leaders who actually prioritize protecting regular people over big defense contracts. #CivilDefenseMatters #SecurityForAll
